text: As I stand here, the dimly lit corridors invite a sense of quiet curiosity—an architectural hush that feels both expectant and isolating. In the near darkness, glass and metal reflect my own half-formed thoughts, returning only faint glimmers of certainty. The second space, with its hints of innovation painted onto a distant wall, evokes both ambition and abandonment—a laboratory of ideas that seems to wait for inspiration to flicker back to life. I feel suspended between potential and emptiness, aware of the stillness but also a readiness stirring deep within me.
